name: USS Soley (DD 707)
events: 29 Dec 1944 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) departed from the Brooklyn Navy Yard for shakedown at Bermuda.
1 Feb 1945 With her shakedown completed USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) returns to the Brooklyn Navy Yard.
18 Feb 1945 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) arrived at Norfolk to serve as a training ship.
31 Jul 1945 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) departed from Norfolk bound for the Pacific.
8 Aug 1945 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) transits the Panama Canal.
17 Aug 1945 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) arrived at San Diego.
27 Aug 1945 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) arrived at Pearl Harbor.
29 Aug 1945 USS Soley (Cdr. J.S. Lewis) departed from Pearl Harbor bound for Kwajalein.
